forecast-period.text: Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely this evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly 20 to 25 km/h in the evening.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h becoming light in the middle of the day.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible. Winds northeasterly 15 to 20 km/h turning north to northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h during the day then becoming northwesterly 30 to 35 km/h during the evening.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northwesterly 30 to 40 km/h tending westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h later.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely this evening. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely at night. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light in the early afternoon.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly 30 to 40 km/h during the day.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the morning. Winds northwesterly 30 to 40 km/h tending westerly 25 to 35 km/h during the morning.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h later.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then tending westerly in the early afternoon.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the early morning. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h tending southwesterly in the middle of the day then becoming light in the late afternoon.

Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible. Winds northeasterly 20 to 30 km/h tending northerly 25 to 35 km/h during the day.
Cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds northerly 20 to 25 km/h turning westerly during the morning.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Cloudy. High chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the day.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely during this afternoon and evening. The chance of a thunderstorm during this afternoon and evening. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the evening.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Partly cloudy. Slight chance of a shower. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then becoming light in the early afternoon.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the evening. Winds northerly 15 to 25 km/h increasing to 25 to 35 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the evening.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 35 km/h tending westerly during the day then decreasing to 15 to 25 km/h during the afternoon.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds westerly 15 to 25 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h tending westerly 15 to 20 km/h during the day.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Light winds becoming westerly 15 to 25 km/h during the morning.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the late morning and afternoon. Light winds becoming northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h in the morning then tending westerly 15 to 25 km/h in the middle of the day.
Sun protection 11:30am to 12:50pm, UV Index predicted to reach 3 [Moderate]
Mostly sunny morning. Slight chance of a shower, most likely at night. Winds westerly 15 to 20 km/h becoming light before dawn then becoming northerly 15 to 25 km/h in the late afternoon.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible. Winds northerly 25 to 35 km/h increasing to 30 to 45 km/h during the morning then tending northwesterly 25 to 30 km/h during the evening.

Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the morning and afternoon. Winds northwesterly 25 to 30 km/h tending westerly 30 to 35 km/h during the morning then decreasing to 20 to 25 km/h during the afternoon.
Mostly sunny morning. Medium chance of showers, most likely later in the day. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers, most likely later in the day. Winds northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Partly cloudy. Medium chance of showers. Winds northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h turning west to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h during the day.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers, becoming less likely this evening. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending southwesterly in the early afternoon then becoming light in the late evening.
Sun protection not recommended, UV Index predicted to reach 2 [Low]
Cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely in the evening. Light winds becoming northerly 15 to 20 km/h in the early afternoon then tending northeasterly 15 to 25 km/h in the evening.

Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm in the afternoon and evening. Damaging winds possible. Winds north to northeasterly 20 to 25 km/h turning northwesterly 30 to 40 km/h during the morning.
Partly cloudy. Very high chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds westerly 25 to 40 km/h.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm during the morning. Winds westerly 20 to 30 km/h tending northwesterly 15 to 20 km/h later.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers. The chance of a thunderstorm. Winds west to northwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.
Partly cloudy. High chance of showers, most likely during the morning. Winds northwest to southwesterly 15 to 25 km/h.
